# Zap

> Zap combines several protocol actions into a single transaction, making common strategies easier to execute.

Canonical URL: https://polaris-finance.github.io/polaris-docs/testnet/zap
Markdown URL: https://polaris-finance.github.io/polaris-docs/testnet/zap.md
Section: Using Polaris Testnet

Documentation index: https://polaris-finance.github.io/polaris-docs/llms.txt
Full documentation bundle: https://polaris-finance.github.io/polaris-docs/llms-full.txt

---

Zap combines several protocol actions into a single transaction, making common strategies easier to execute.

The final result is identical to performing every step manually, while reducing the number of transactions required. Positions created through Zap can always be managed later using the standard sections of the application.

Available strategies may evolve over time as new protocol features are introduced.

Current strategies are:

- USDp Stable Yield: Converts ETH into USDp and deposits it into the USDp Earn Vault
- Floor Carry: Converts ETH into fpETH and opens a Reserve Loan, making it easy to build non-liquidatable looping positions.
